retrieved_result: Definition of butch "butchadjectivemasculine. When used to describe women, usually used in reference to masculine lesbians. That girl is so butch. Citation from "Notapusy", Arrested Development (TV, 2005), Season 3 Episode 4 blacked out to resolve Google's penalty against this site. Citation from "Episode 3", Misfi
